notes: Pure score-based decline; fraud and policy should not override

description: Auto-approve: excellent profile across all signals
notes: All three signals green; composite score should be low

description: Manual review: fair credit score band (580-669)
notes: Borderline score triggers review; low fraud risk should not escalate to DECLINE

description: Fraud + score combined: address mismatch with delinquencies
notes: Fraud rules fire (address mismatch + 2 delinquencies >= threshold of 2)

description: High utilization with good score: medium risk
notes: Good score but utilization near high threshold; delinquency adds caution

description: Policy override: combined risk triggers policy decline
notes: Policy rule policy_decline_combined_risk fires: score<620 AND util>70

description: Challenger threshold boundary: score between 580-599 (champion DECLINE, challenger MANUAL_REVIEW)
notes: Key boundary case for champion/challenger experiment: v1.0.0 declines at 580, v1.1.0 at 600
